search_queries_used: site:mhaus.org family history malignant hyperthermia manage patient
site:asahq.org preanesthesia malignant hyperthermia family history
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic management or dose instructions for Malignant hyperthermia history documentation
generic anesthesia landing pages without an exact section for Malignant hyperthermia history documentation
rejection_reasons: Anesthetic planning, emergency treatment, medicine dose, and diagnostic status require specialist management and were outside scope.
The candidate source category "dantrolene dosing guidance" did not provide exact documentation-only evidence for this workflow and was not mapped.
The candidate source category "automatic susceptibility labels" did not provide exact documentation-only evidence for this workflow and was not mapped.
Autonomous management, medication, dose, procedure, escalation, or discharge instructions were outside the documentation-only scope.
Landing pages and search snippets were not accepted as exact evidence.
population_applicability: Patients reporting a personal or family malignant-hyperthermia history during preanesthesia assessment.
setting_applicability: Direct for history and verification documentation; active crisis, testing, and anesthetic preparation are outside scope.
UAE_applicability: MHAUS is international specialty evidence; UAE referral, testing, registry, and facility preparedness require local review.
recency_verification: The official MHAUS recommendation posted in 2018 and ASA preanesthesia standards were reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: No newer MHAUS recommendation on suspected personal or family history before diagnostic testing was identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact MHAUS 2018 recommendation supports documenting a suspected personal or family MH history and incomplete records or testing context; it does not confirm susceptibility or generate an anesthetic plan.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting suspected personal or family malignant-hyperthermia history, unclear or unavailable prior episode details, and diagnostic-testing context without confirming susceptibility or generating management.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for Malignant hyperthermia history documentation; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

unresolved_source_gaps: Personal versus family history, relative, event details, records, genetic or contracture testing, susceptibility conclusion, alert status, anesthetic plan, and emergency management remain unsupported.
Legacy duration presets, broad generic interval-history wording, and any content not explicitly mapped to an exact section remain unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No source mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, anesthesia plan, investigation, procedure, medication, dose, referral, discharge decision, or urgency conclusion.
UAE facility policy, credentialing, pathway, and qualified anesthesiologist review remain required before use.
